text.title: rust-tokio-async Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the rust-tokio-async methodology end-to-end.

step.name: classify-workload
step.action: Pick one of {try_join, spawn_blocking, buffer_unordered, JoinSet, select}.

step.name: set-concurrency-bound
step.action: Choose N <= pool_size; document the choice.

step.name: wrap-io-in-timeout
step.action: Wrap every reqwest/sqlx/grpc call with tokio::time::timeout.
step.decision-gate: If any call lacks a timeout, STOP and apply r6.

step.name: audit-await-safety
step.action: Verify no MutexGuard crosses .await; mark cancel-safety on select! branches.
